title: The Hurt Locker
subTitle: Sergeant William James is tasked with training a bomb disposal team during the Iraq War. His ideologies and reckless approach towards the job gives rise to conflicts with his subordinates.

title: The Beast
subTitle: In an AI ruled future, Gabrielle signs up for a DNA purification that will rid her of unnecessary emotions. However, reliving her past lives as part of the process turns unnerving.

title: Bad Moms
subTitle: Pushed beyond their limits, three overworked and stressed-out mums, Amy, Carla and Kiki, decide to go wild after ditching their daily routines.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Judge Vicky Ratnani reveals the theme to Chefs Alpan and Inder. Subsequently, they create Indian dishes using foreign ingredients.

title: Cold Skin
subTitle: A meteorologist travels to a remote island in the South Atlantic to work as a weather observer. However, he finds himself trapped amongst dangerous creatures living on the island.

title: Danger Close
subTitle: Young and amateur Australian and New Zealand soldiers strive hard to survive during the brutal Battle of Long Tan in Vietnam.

title: Tai Chi Hero
subTitle: Lu Chan is still trying to find his place in his new home, but his presence in Chen Village triggers a curse on the town.

title: Jurassic Attack
subTitle: Following their latest covert operation, an elite squad's return flight ends in disaster, leaving them stranded in a remote forest amongst prehistoric predators.

title: Foxcatcher
subTitle: Mark and David Schultz, brothers and Olympic wrestling champions, join a team called Foxcatcher, which changes their lives.

title: The Marsh King's Daughter
subTitle: Helena is haunted by memories of her estranged father Jacob, who held her and her mother captive for years. However, when he escapes prison, she becomes paranoid as she prepares for his arrival.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Military-industrial thugs kill a Marine (Daniel Hugh Kelly) to keep him quiet, but his ex-Marine wife (Amy Madigan) fights back.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: Atomic Blonde
subTitle: Lorraine Broughton, who works as a spy for MI6, is sent on a mission to Berlin just before the collapse of the wall, to get hold of a stolen list, which has the names of exceptional secret agents.

title: Atomic Blonde
subTitle: Lorraine Broughton, who works as a spy for MI6, is sent on a mission to Berlin just before the collapse of the wall, to get hold of a stolen list, which has the names of exceptional secret agents.

title: Fury
subTitle: Towards the end of the Second World War, Don Collier, a tank commander, is pushed to make tough decisions for the survival of his crew as they fight their way across Germany.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Gaurav Gera and Vicky Ratnani engage in a lively game with Chef Kiran and Chef Harpal. The chefs then showcase their culinary skills by preparing themed dishes.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Ajay Chopra and Shipra Khanna make a delicious biryani using mutton. Later, they elaborate the day's challenge to chefs, Nalini and Yash Dadlani.

title: The Iron Claw
subTitle: The Von Erich siblings battle adversity and their father's imposing legacy as they climb the ranks of the professional wrestling world.

title: Mulan Legend
subTitle: During the reign of the Northern Wei Dynasty, Hua Mulan enlists a group of convicts and thieves to help save a princess from an enemy general.

title: A Bad Moms Christmas
subTitle: When their own mothers pay them an unexpected visit, three women rebel against the heavy burden of living up to their expectations when it comes to preparing for Christmas.

title: Uncaged
subTitle: A sleepwalking teen attaches a camera to himself at night. Later, he finds out a dark secret about his family from the footage.

title: Vertigo
subTitle: Scottie Ferguson, a former police officer from San Francisco suffering from acrophobia, is hired by an old friend to investigate the peculiar behaviour of his beautiful wife, Madeleine.

title: Jeepers Creepers 2
subTitle: A bus carrying a high school basketball team suffers a flat tyre following the kidnapping of Billy Taggar. Trouble ensues when those on board encounter the Creeper, a demonic winged creature.

title: Wrong Place
subTitle: Jake, the son of the notorious drug dealer Virgil, goes after former policeman Frank's daughter to stop him from testifying against his father. However, an unexpected surprise awaits him.

title: Please Stand By
subTitle: Wendy, a young woman with autism, runs away from her caregiver and embarks on a journey of a lifetime in order to submit her manuscript to a screenwriting competition.

title: Master So Dragon Subduing Palms 2
subTitle: During the Qing dynasty, two guards, Su Beg Er and Tie Qiao San, investigate the mysterious murders of two governors in Linjiang County. They join a local gang to uncover a dangerous python cult.

title: King
subTitle: Raja and his father, who live in Hong Kong, are devastated when an accident leaves the latter on the verge of death. He decides to reunite his father with his grandfather in order to make him happy.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: The Gentlemen
subTitle: When cannabis mogul Mickey Pearson plans to sell his profitable marijuana empire following his retirement, it stimulates an array of wrongdoings in the name of greed.

title: Vice
subTitle: Dick Cheney embarks on an ambitious journey, evolving from a mere bureaucratic official in Washington to becoming an influential vice president under George W Bush.

subTitle: A washed up singer returns to his hometown and enters a well-drilling contest for a chance to win the prize money. Chaos ensues after he awakens a ferocious, hibernating beast.
